description: Ready.gov and Energy Saver '#WinterReady' graphic in landscape format. The background is an illustrated winter scene: light and dark blue stylized mountains, a white snowdrift along the bottom, and scattered falling-snow dots across a blue sky. Centered is a circular photo vignette (ringed in dark blue) showing a small wooden model house with a gray knit pom-pom beanie on top and a chunky red knit scarf wrapped around it. The top-right shows two white logos: 'energy saver' (with a house and plug icon) and 'Ready' (with a checkmark). Below the photo, a dark navy banner holds white text: 'Keep your house warm this season with insulation, caulking, and weather stripping!' At the bottom is the hashtag wordmark '#WINTERREADY' in green and dark-blue letters with dripping-icicle accents.
notable_text: Keep your house warm this season with insulation, caulking, and weather stripping!; #WINTERREADY; energy saver; Ready
